data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adobe employs a microservices architecture for its suite of cloud products, enabling segmented functionality and scalable development.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The site is hosted on a scalable cloud platform to manage traffic and ensure reliability.

data.title: CDN Usage
data.description: Content Delivery Network is used to improve load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Akamai CDN, global edge nodes, HTTP/2

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Relational and NoSQL databases are utilized for data storage and management.

data.title: Service Oriented Architecture
data.description: An SOA model is followed to provide discrete services that communicate over a network.
data.technical_spec: SOAP/REST protocols, message queuing, API gateways
